<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Vumerity is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with relapsing remitting multiple sclerosis (see Section&nbsp;5.1 for important information on the populations for which efficacy has been...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>diabetic cataract（100.0%）</li>
<li>diabetic retinopathy（100.0%）</li>
<li>severe nonproliferative diabetic retinopathy（100.0%）</li>
<li>craniostenosis cataract（100.0%）</li>

<li>immature cataract（100.0%）</li>

<li>nuclear senile cataract（100.0%）</li>
<li>diabetes mellitus type 2 associated cataract（100.0%）</li>
<li>cortical cataract（100.0%）</li>
<li>senile cataract（100.0%）</li>
<li>dermatitis（100.0%）</li>
<li>exanthem (disease)（100.0%）</li>
<li>drug-induced osteoporosis（100.0%）</li>
<li>iris disease（100.0%）</li>
<li>acrodermatitis chronica atrophicans（100.0%）</li>
<li>neonatal dermatomyositis（100.0%）</li>
<li>panuveitis (disease)（100.0%）</li>
<li>isolated iridoschisis（100.0%）</li>
<li>amyopathic dermatomyositis（100.0%）</li>
</ul></li>
